project: OpenTabs Platform — E2E Tests for Self-Bootstrap Browser Tools (Retry)
description: Add comprehensive E2E tests for browser tools: network request/response body capture, browser_get_page_html, and browser_get_storage. These tools were implemented without E2E coverage and need full pipeline verification.

userStories.title: Add E2E tests for network request and response body capture
userStories.description: As a developer, I want E2E tests verifying that network capture includes request bodies (POST data) and response bodies so that the full pipeline for API traffic inspection is verified end-to-end.
acceptanceCriteria: New test describe block 'Browser tools — network body capture' in browser-tools.e2e.ts

Test: captured POST requests include requestBody — enables network capture, triggers a POST /api/echo with JSON body via execute_script, verifies captured request has requestBody containing the sent JSON
Test: captured requests include responseBody — enables capture, triggers /api/status, verifies captured request has responseBody containing valid JSON
Tests use existing waitForNetworkRequests helper pattern from browser-tools.e2e.ts
userStories.notes:
Follow existing 'Browser tools — network capture lifecycle' test patterns. Key pattern:
1. initAndListTools(mcpServer, mcpClient)
2. openTestServerTab(mcpClient, testServer) to get tabId
3. browser_enable_network_capture on the tab
4. Trigger request via browser_execute_script: fetch('/api/echo', {method:'POST', headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'}, body: JSON.stringify({message:'test-body'})})
5. waitForNetworkRequests(mcpClient, tabId) to poll until requests appear
6. browser_get_network_requests to retrieve captured requests
7. Find /api/echo request and assert requestBody contains 'test-body'
8. Clean up: browser_disable_network_capture, browser_close_tab

The test server has POST /api/echo that echoes back {ok: true, message: <input>}.

userStories.title: Add E2E tests for browser_get_page_html
userStories.description: As a developer, I want E2E tests verifying that browser_get_page_html returns correct HTML content so that the full pipeline for HTML extraction is verified end-to-end.
acceptanceCriteria: New test describe block 'Browser tools — page HTML' in browser-tools.e2e.ts
Test: browser_get_page_html returns full page HTML — opens test server tab, calls tool with just tabId, verifies result has title, url, html fields, html contains '<html' and '</html>'
Test: browser_get_page_html with selector returns scoped HTML — calls with selector '#test-btn' on /interactive page, verifies html contains button text but NOT '<html'
Test: browser_get_page_html returns error for non-existent selector
'browser_get_page_html' added to BROWSER_TOOL_NAMES in helpers.ts if not already present
userStories.notes:
Follow existing browser tool test patterns. Use initAndListTools + openTestServerTab to get tabId.

For selector test, navigate to /interactive first using browser_navigate_tab, then call with {tabId, selector: '#test-btn'}.

The handler returns {title, url, html} on success, or {error: 'Element not found: <selector>'} on failure.

The /interactive page has elements like #test-btn, #test-input, #test-textarea — good targets for selector tests.

userStories.title: Add E2E tests for browser_get_storage
userStories.description: As a developer, I want E2E tests verifying that browser_get_storage reads localStorage and sessionStorage correctly so that the full pipeline is verified end-to-end.
acceptanceCriteria: New test describe block 'Browser tools — web storage' in browser-tools.e2e.ts
Test: browser_get_storage reads localStorage entries — uses execute_script to set localStorage, calls browser_get_storage with storageType 'local', verifies entry present
Test: browser_get_storage reads a specific key — sets localStorage entry, calls with specific key, verifies result
Test: browser_get_storage reads sessionStorage — sets sessionStorage entry, calls with storageType 'session', verifies entry present
Test: browser_get_storage returns error for non-existent tab
Tests clean up storage entries via execute_script after each test
'browser_get_storage' added to BROWSER_TOOL_NAMES in helpers.ts if not already present
userStories.notes:
Pattern:
1. initAndListTools + openTestServerTab to get tabId
2. Use browser_execute_script to set storage: "localStorage.setItem('e2e-test-key', 'e2e-test-value')"
3. Call browser_get_storage with {tabId, storageType: 'local'}
4. Parse result and find entry matching key 'e2e-test-key'
5. Clean up: "localStorage.removeItem('e2e-test-key')"

Handler returns: when key specified: {key, value}; when key omitted: {entries: [{key, value}...], count}.

For non-existent tab, call with tabId 999999, verify isError is true.
